json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="actions" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" identifiers="key">
<prop type="array" name="items" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" required="True" identifiers="name">

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

command.name: create
command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.actions" options="actions" group="Properties">
<help short="ISO 8601 duration for how long the action runs (e.g., PT30M for 30 minutes). Supports template macro syntax (%%\{parameters.\\}%%)."/>
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.actions[].parameters" options="parameters">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.actions[].runAfter.items" options="items" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.parameters" options="parameters" group="Properties">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="actions" arg="$resource.properties.actions" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" arg="$resource.properties.actions[].parameters" identifiers="key">
<prop type="array" name="items" arg="$resource.properties.actions[].runAfter.items" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" arg="$resource.properties.parameters" required="True" identifiers="name">

<prop type="array" name="actions" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" identifiers="key">
<prop type="array" name="items" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" required="True" identifiers="name">

command.name: update
command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.actions" options="actions" group="Properties">
<help short="ISO 8601 duration for how long the action runs (e.g., PT30M for 30 minutes). Supports template macro syntax (%%\{parameters.\\}%%)."/>
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.actions[].parameters" options="parameters">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.actions[].runAfter.items" options="items">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.parameters" options="parameters" group="Properties">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="actions" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" identifiers="key">
<prop type="array" name="items" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" required="True" identifiers="name">

<prop type="array" name="actions" arg="$resource.properties.actions" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" arg="$resource.properties.actions[].parameters" identifiers="key">
<prop type="array" name="items" arg="$resource.properties.actions[].runAfter.items" required="True" identifiers="name">
<prop type="array" name="parameters" arg="$resource.properties.parameters" required="True" identifiers="name">
